description: Detects path traversal risks in Rust: unvalidated path join/push calls. Simplified from Rust: flags all .join() and .push() method calls on any receiver, not just those with param-derived arguments or path-named receivers. Precision reduced -- non-path join/push calls also flagged.

flag.message: Method call that may be a path operation with untrusted input -- verify .join()/.push() are not used with unvalidated user input
